rate_card.chargeable_weight_rule: max(actual_weight_g, ceil(length_cm * width_cm * height_cm / 6000)) rounded up to next 100g for fee calculation

assumptions: Estimate for small cross-border parcel from China to Singapore.
Final rate depends on chosen forwarder and platform logistics program.
Mini desk vacuum package specs are supplier-confirmation inputs, not seller promises.
Use the high scenario for stress-testing return and shipping-cost sensitivity.
